_comment: Erklaerungen fuer Waffen-/Universal-Sonderregeln, die NewRecruit NICHT exportiert (nur die Namen stehen im Waffenprofil). Schluessel = Regelname OHNE (X)-Klammer. Quelle/Pruefung: https://tow.whfb.app/special-rules . Frei editierbar; fehlende Regeln einfach ergaenzen.

glossary.Helblaster: Before rolling To Hit, roll 3 Artillery dice; shots fired = their total. 1 Misfire: all shots −1 To Hit. 2 Misfires: no shots, roll on the Black Powder Misfire table. 3 Misfires: fires 30 shots, then is destroyed.
glossary.Move or Shoot: Cannot be fired in the Shooting phase if the model moved for any reason this turn (including rallying).
glossary.Move or Fire: Cannot be fired in the Shooting phase if the model moved for any reason this turn (including rallying).
glossary.Quick Shot: Does not suffer the usual −1 To Hit modifier for moving and shooting.
glossary.Multiple Shots: May fire a single shot, or the number shown in brackets. If firing multiple shots, each To Hit roll suffers an additional −1 modifier.
glossary.Volley Fire: When shooting, half (rounding up) of the models in each rank behind the front rank may also shoot. Not usable if the unit moved this turn or when making a Stand & Shoot.
glossary.Cumbersome: Cannot be used when making a Stand & Shoot charge reaction.
glossary.Killing Blow: Natural 6 To Wound in combat: an infantry or cavalry target gets no Armour or Regeneration save (Ward saves still apply) and, if wounded, loses all remaining Wounds.
glossary.Heroic Killing Blow: As Killing Blow, but works against a target of any troop type (including monsters and larger models).
glossary.Multiple Wounds: Each unsaved wound is multiplied by the value shown (e.g. (2) = 2 Wounds lost per unsaved wound).
glossary.Armour Bane: On a natural 6 To Wound, the weapon's Armour Piercing is improved by the value shown.
glossary.Requires Two Hands: Uses both hands: while wielding it you get no shield benefit in combat and no +1 Attack from an additional hand weapon (paired weapons).
glossary.Strike Last: Reduces the model's Initiative to 1 in combat (before other modifiers). Cancels out with Strike First.
glossary.Strikes Last: Reduces the model's Initiative to 1 in combat (before other modifiers). Cancels out with Strike First.
glossary.Breath Weapon: Once per round in the Shooting phase: place the flame template from the model's base across its front arc. Not usable in combat or as a Stand & Shoot reaction.
glossary.Magical Attacks: Hits from this weapon count as magical (needed to harm Ethereal and similar models).
glossary.Flaming Attacks: Hits count as flaming: they negate Regeneration and are especially effective against flammable foes.
glossary.Fight in Extra Rank: The unit may make supporting attacks from one additional rank.
glossary.Dwarf Crafted: Does not suffer the usual −1 To Hit modifier when making a Stand & Shoot charge reaction.
glossary.Bombardment: Indirect fire: does not need line of sight to the target (the shot is hurled over intervening units and terrain), but is otherwise treated as a normal shot.
glossary.Cannon Fire: Choose a point within the war machine's line of sight and maximum range; resolve the cannonball's strike and bounce against models in its path. Uses the Black Powder Misfire table.
glossary.Multi-Barrelled: When shooting (organ gun), roll two Artillery dice before rolling To Hit; the number of shots fired equals their total.
glossary.Ponderous: Suffers a −2 To Hit modifier for Moving and Shooting, instead of the usual −1.
